title: Moss And Rice Packaging System Thinking Packaging Board
sourceTitle: Moss And Rice Packaging System Thinking Packaging Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable packaging proposal board with brand packaging proposal board with product mockups, material samples, label zones, and structured presentation layout. 4:5. 20-26. packaging-system thinking Product Line: premium herbal snack gift set. Fictional Brand: MOSS & RICE. Package Forms: stand-up pouch, rigid gift box, bottle label, and shopping bag mockup. Design System: botanical illustration, small seal mark, single-language English label grid, and tactile paper texture. Display. Layout: proposal board with front view, side view, detail closeups, and material notes. Palette: moss green, warm rice paper, charcoal ink, and muted gold. Subject: Make premium herbal snack gift set the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Composition and Layout: Use proposal board with front view, side view, detail closeups, and material notes. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in brand packaging proposal board visual finish preserving these source cues: packaging-system thinking, proposal-board layout, mockups plus annotations/material notes. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use moss green, warm rice paper, charcoal ink, and muted gold. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
